evidence_label: case-001 ginger extract standardization gate, not treatment advice

source_checks.result: PMID 40938906, DOI 10.1371/journal.pone.0332386, PLOS One 2025 ex vivo beta-thalassemia red-cell support paper
Focused ginger, Zingiber, 6-shogaol, 6-gingerol plus fetal hemoglobin, gamma-globin, HBG1, or HBG2 query returned 0 records
ginger thalassemia and Zingiber thalassemia queries returned no studies
Ginger remains an Islamic motivation anchor only, not biomedical proof

required_material_fields: extract process, with PEF or equivalent process named
quantified 6-shogaol and 6-gingerol content by HPLC, LC-MS, or equivalent method
microbial, contaminant, or matrix-control context if available

support_only_endpoint_set: oxidative hemolysis challenge if the lab supports it
red-cell membrane non-heme iron if the lab supports it
osmotic fragility or red-cell deformability if available
methemoglobin or membrane-damage context if available
blocked_public_content: patient samples without ethics and clinician review
decision_rule: Move ginger extract from held to quote-candidate only when the material is standardized, marker compounds are quantified, matrix and vehicle controls are explicit, and the lab accepts support-only red-cell endpoints without HbF, cure, supplementation, or patient-action framing.
